name: codestory
description: CodeStory grounding for Codex over the local codestory-cli stdio server.

interface.shortDescription: Use local CodeStory grounding from Codex
interface.longDescription: CodeStory gives Codex a local, read-only grounding surface backed by codestory-cli. It exposes the existing CodeStory skill plus the local stdio protocol without duplicating indexing, retrieval, packet, or sidecar logic in the plugin.
defaultPrompt: @CodeStory check local_navigation and agent_packet_search on this checkout, ground the repo, and tell me whether sidecars need repair before I use packet.
@CodeStory Where is RefreshMode defined, which codestory-cli commands accept --refresh, and what is the call path from index into codestory-store?
@CodeStory I am editing a file in this repo. What symbols are affected and what tests should I run first?
